detail.rationale: State marker "client brief received" and deliverable "prioritized initial backlog + acceptance criteria" match WF-001's arrow exactly (Client brief → prioritized backlog + acceptance criteria); the UX-designer submitter is advisory only.

Current state "PI-7 planning starts next month" on a SAFe ART and deliverable "PI planning outputs, sprint backlog and executive-committee progress reporting" match WF-002's arrow (PI Planning → sprint backlog → executive-committee progress reporting) end to end.
State marker "validated prototype" matches WF-003's "Validated idea" entry state, and the expected deliverable (architecture, code, deployment, security audit) mirrors its arrow exactly.

State marker "Engagement signed" with expected deliverables "maturity audit + AI strategy roadmap + training plan + executive readout" matches WF-004's arrow exactly (engagement signed → maturity audit → strategy → training plan → executive deliverables).

State marker "weekly digest of GenAI market moves" (market signal / weekly cadence) plus deliverable "qualified synthesis + LinkedIn publication-ready posts" matches WF-005's arrow market signal → qualified synthesis → thought-leadership content → publication.

State marker "RFP received" and deliverable "qualified go/no-go + full commercial proposal with costing" exactly match WF-006's arrow (RFP received → qualification → scoping → architecture → schedule → costing → commercial proposal).

State marker "Engagement signed" with expected deliverable "kickoff plan + D1 kit + D5 scoping" matches WF-007's arrow (Engagement signed → client context → kickoff plan → D1 deliverables → D5 scoping) end to end.

State "AI system in production flagged for compliance audit" matches WF-008's entry state "AI system to audit", and the expected deliverable "compliance audit report and remediation plan" matches its output "report + remediation plan".
Current state "identified hiring need" (no job description, no pipeline) with deliverable "job description → sourcing → assessment → selection → offer" exactly matches WF-009's arrow.

State marker "project closed" with expected deliverable "lessons-learned report and improvement plan" matches WF-010's arrow exactly (Project closed → collection → analysis → lessons-learned report → improvement plan); submitter role (QA Manager) is advisory only.

Current state is a direct pre-signature solicitation with explicitly no RFP received, so while the expected deliverable (commercial proposal) matches WF-006's endpoint, its entry state 'RFP received' is not met and no other workflow starts from an unsigned prospect ask.

State marker "engagement signed" with expected deliverable "AI maturity diagnostic report" matches WF-004's arrow (Engagement signed → maturity audit → …), whose first phase produces exactly the maturity diagnostic before strategy and training.

State marker "major incident" (production fraud-scoring failure, project-level incident with logs available) plus expected deliverable "post-mortem analysis and lessons-learned report" match WF-010's arrow "Project closed (or major incident) → collection → analysis → lessons-learned report → improvement plan".

State "legal contract drafting need" with deliverable "drafted master service agreement" matches no catalog arrow — WF-008 is the only legal-adjacent workflow but starts from "AI system to audit" and ends in a compliance report, which the brief explicitly excludes.

State is an unbounded ongoing-operations engagement and the deliverable is continuous 24/7 on-call coverage; no catalog workflow's arrow ends in continuous operations service (all target bounded deliverables like backlogs, launches, audits, proposals, or hires).

Current state "model pretraining program on proprietary corpus" with deliverable "pretrained proprietary LLM" matches no catalog arrow — no workflow covers foundation-model training, and the brief explicitly excludes an application build.
State "office move to organize" with deliverable "executed office move" is pure facilities logistics; no catalog workflow's state → deliverable arrow covers non-digital facilities execution.

State marker "Client brief received" plus expected deliverable "prioritized initial backlog with acceptance criteria" matches WF-001's arrow (Client brief → prioritized backlog + acceptance criteria) exactly; HR submitter is advisory only and does not pull toward WF-009.

State "AI system in production to audit" plus deliverable "compliance audit report against AI Act/GDPR with remediation actions" matches WF-008's arrow (AI system to audit → obligations mapping → … → report + remediation plan); submitter role (Lead Data Scientist) is ignored per rules.
